summary: Iteration 2 verification of Sableheart Healthcare CRM. Backend pytest 10/10 PASS (default stages, list backfill, key normalisation 'Care Plan'->'care_plan', 400 on empty, 404 on missing loc, patient default stage='intake', integrations round-trip with masking, empty values do not overwrite, location-scope isolation, unknown provider 400, delete location unscopes patients). Frontend Playwright validation: sidebar shows EXACTLY the 8 nav items (Overview, Patients, Calendar, Call Queue, Team Chat, AI Studio, Integrations, System Admin) with NO Board / Locations entries (data-testid nav-board=0, nav-locations=0). /board redirects to /patients?view=kanban and /locations redirects to /sysadmin (replace history). Patients page has Table | Kanban | Profiles segmented toggle wired to ?view= query; default ?view absent => Table active. Patient cards expose data-testid card-crn-{id}, card-stage-{id} (only on kanban variant; absent on profiles), card-doctor-{id}, card-updated-{id} — full name renders on its own row above the CRN chip with no truncation. Integrations page provider list contains EXACTLY twilio/google/outlook/calendly (provider-openai count=0, provider-claude count=0) and the subtitle includes the literal string 'AI is bundled with your subscription'. /sysadmin shows the 'Care centres' section ABOVE the billing card with heading 'Manage locations & pipelines', NewLocationForm (data-testid new-loc-form), seat-billing hint reading '5 seats × $45/mo = $225/mo', 5 default stage rows in the StagesEditor, working Add stage / Remove / Reset / colour / label / key / Save (PATCH /locations/{id}/stages) and Delete location button (data-testid loc-delete-{id}) gated by window.confirm.

issues: Two 500 errors observed in console on first paint while backend rebooted from hot-reload — auxiliary fetches in AppShell don't surface a UI error (silent catch). Cosmetic only; goes away after the next refreshKey bump.

action_items: Optional: surface a small toast when AppShell.loadAuxiliary() fails so silent 500s during transient backend restarts are visible to the user.

Optional: SettingsPage twilio-card has a <select> mapping patients to <option> children — Emergent's dev annotator injects a <span> inside <option> and React logs a hydration warning. Cosmetic dev-only; ignore for prod.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1275 lines — well over the 700-line guideline. Recommend splitting into routers: locations.py, patients.py, integrations.py, ai.py, analytics.py.
server.py still uses deprecated @app.on_event startup/shutdown — migrate to FastAPI lifespan context manager.

_redact_integrations heuristic for what counts as 'secret' is the substring 'key|token|secret' in the field name; explicit per-provider secret allow-list would be safer (e.g. tenant_id contains 'id' not 'secret' but is also OK; today only fields whose name matches are masked, which is correct, but worth documenting).

PATCH /locations/{loc_id}/stages silently de-duplicates stages with the same generated key — adding 'Care Plan' twice collapses to one entry. Consider returning 400 on duplicate keys to avoid surprise data loss.

Delete location does NOT cascade-clear ai_usage/sms_logs/call_logs/calendar_events tied to that loc — only chat_messages are removed and patients are unscoped. Acceptable but document the retention behaviour.

LocationsAdminSection.jsx LocationCard 'save' calls three sequential fetches (meta, fields, stages) without awaiting Promise.all and without rolling back on partial failure. Low risk but worth noting.

IntegrationsPage ProviderForm.handleSave sends only fields the user typed — good; but the PATCH endpoint also accepts unknown keys without validation. Consider whitelisting per-provider on the backend.
seed_data_creation: Backend starts empty per design. Pytest fixtures create + tear down their own PyTest Centre + Carol Doe. Playwright created a 'PWTest Clinic' centre to verify add-flow then deleted it.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run `python -m pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v` for the regression suite (10 tests, ~0.1s). Public URL is in /app/frontend/.env (REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL). Confirmed UI testids: app-shell, sidebar, nav, nav-overview/-patients/-calendar/-call-queue/-team-chat/-ai-studio/-integrations/-system-admin (no nav-board or nav-locations), patients-page, patients-view-toggle, view-table/-kanban/-profiles (use [data-active=true]), kanban-card-{id}, card-crn-{id}, card-stage-{id} (kanban variant only), card-doctor-{id}, card-updated-{id}, integrations-page, provider-twilio/-google/-outlook/-calendly (NO openai/claude), scope-toggle/-system, locations-admin, new-loc-form, new-loc-name/-spec/-network/-seats/-submit, loc-{id}, loc-name/-spec/-net/-seats/-{id}, stage-row-{i}, stage-label-{i}, stage-key-{i}, loc-save-{id}, loc-delete-{id}, topbar-new-intake, intake-first-name/-last-name/-submit, location-picker, picker-all/{id}.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — all listed acceptance criteria verified.
